patch.value: CI: skip non-source jobs on docs-only changes

Currently any docs/README/CHANGELOG edit triggers the full 5-matrix CI run (~60 GitHub-minutes). Add paths-ignore to CI push trigger for ['docs/**', '**/*.md', 'CHANGELOG.md', 'CONTRIBUTING.md', '.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/**'] OR use a fast 'paths' filter job that conditionally skips build-test. Keep PR-side strict so docs PRs still get a smoke run for confidence.
Docs-only push to main skips build-test entirely or runs only a 1-job smoke validate; PRs still run a minimal check for safety; release.yml and nightly.yml unaffected.
